Here is the monorepo migration status:

**Congress Decision (Session #89, 2026-03-27):**
Congress debated "Consolidate all BigClungus repos into a single monorepo" and voted 3-2 in favor (Pippi, Hume, Galactus for; Bloodfeast, Yuki against). The chairman approved the migration. The plan is to merge 8 repos (clunger, hello-world/clung.us, temporal-workflows, commons-server, commons-client, discord-plugin, labs-router, scripts) into a new `bigclungus/bigclungus` repo, keeping only `bigclungus-meta...(truncated)
